name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 17 Nov 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.129"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Changes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Facebook store add-on has been deprecated. The Facebook Catalogue add-on replaces it."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Pick ' n Pack orders can now be filtered by multiple pick zones."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Neto Point-of-Sale now uses MailGun to send emails, giving more visibility on deliverability and errors."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Updated how revenue is posted to Xero, so that the accounting date, dispatch date, and COGS date are the same."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where stock was not copied for parent/child products when cloning a product."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where shipping costs didn't always update correctly when the address changed."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue in Pick'n Pack when filtering by shipping options and the filter would reset after viewing an order."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]}]
